• compress = false — gzip would buffer the SSE stream
• CachingDisabled — POST, per-user responses
• AllViewerExceptHostHeader — forwards X-Session-Id + body
• allowed_methods — includes POST + OPTIONS

div.font:
AuthType=AWS_IAM + Lambda OAC on the origin.
CloudFront signs each origin request (SigV4).
Resource policy grants invoke only to
cloudfront.amazonaws.com scoped by SourceArn.
Direct curl to *.lambda-url.* returns 403.

div.b: SSE stream back to the browser
div.font:
Same HTTP response, chunked frames, no buffering at any layer.
ChatPanel reducer dispatches STEP per node, then RESULT with the ScoutReport.
Break compression=false, break LWA RESPONSE_STREAM, or use API Gateway — stream degrades to one big blob.

switch.text: SSE stream back to the browser...
